summary: Universal Generation Status Page Features VERIFIED - ALL 13 BACKEND TESTS PASSED + FRONTEND VERIFIED. New features: (1) ETA + elapsed time display in timing object, (2) Safe-to-leave messaging with wired Notify button via /api/notifications/generation/{job_id}/subscribe, (3) What's Happening Now stage explanation section, (4) Explore While Waiting section with tool cards + rotating quotes, (5) Completion routing with Watch/Remix/Share/Download. All data-testid attributes present in ProgressiveGeneration.js.
critical_code_review_comments: notification_routes.py: POST /api/notifications/generation/{job_id}/subscribe returns 404 for nonexistent jobs - VERIFIED (line 117)
notification_routes.py: GET /api/notifications/unread-count returns unread_count field - VERIFIED (line 52)
story_engine_routes.py: GET /api/story-engine/status/{job_id} returns notification_opt_in field - VERIFIED (line 556)
story_engine_routes.py: GET /api/story-engine/status/{job_id} returns retry_info with can_retry field - VERIFIED (lines 573-581)
story_engine_routes.py: GET /api/story-engine/status/{job_id} returns credits_refunded field - VERIFIED (line 555)
StoryVideoPipeline.js: PostGenPhase shows retry button when canRetry is true - VERIFIED (lines 1463-1464)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test users and story_engine jobs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Universal Generation Status Page features fully verified. Key findings: 1) Backend status endpoint returns timing.elapsed_seconds and timing.eta_seconds (eta_seconds is null for completed jobs), 2) notification_opt_in field tracks whether user subscribed to completion notifications, 3) retry_info object contains can_retry, current_attempt, max_attempts, heartbeat_detail, last_error_stage, 4) credits_refunded field shows refunded credits for failed jobs, 5) POST /api/notifications/generation/{job_id}/subscribe returns 404 for nonexistent jobs and 200 for existing jobs, 6) All ProgressiveGeneration.js data-testid attributes verified in source code (component only renders during active generation), 7) StoryVideoPipeline.js has RetryButton and CancelButton components with proper data-testid attributes, 8) PostGenPhase shows retry button when postGen.canRetry is true. NOTE: Tests must use story_engine jobs (source='story_engine') not legacy_pipeline jobs to get the new fields.

status_timing_eta_seconds.details: GET /api/story-engine/status/{job_id} returns timing.eta_seconds (null for completed jobs)

frontend_progressive_generation_testids.details: All 8 required data-testid attributes present in ProgressiveGeneration.js

frontend_retry_cancel_buttons.details: RetryButton and CancelButton components exist with proper data-testid

frontend_postgen_retry_button.details: PostGenPhase shows retry button when canRetry is true

notification_subscribe_success.message: You'll be notified when it's ready.
